sourcesContent:
// client/src/data/defaultReviews.js
export const defaultReviews = [
  {
    _id: 'def1',
    name: 'James Walker',
    company: 'TechNova - USA',
    rating: 5,
    message: 'Outstanding full stack developer with excellent communication skills. The final website was modern, responsive, and delivered before the deadline.',
    createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 15 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString()
  },
  {
    _id: 'def2',
    name: 'Amelia Johnson',
    company: 'BrightLabs - UK',
    rating: 5,
    message: 'The MERN stack dashboard exceeded expectations. Authentication, APIs, and frontend animations were implemented professionally. Highly recommended!',
    createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 32 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString()
  },
  {
    _id: 'def3',
    name: 'Oliver Smith',
    company: 'PixelForge - Canada',
    rating: 5,
    message: 'Very reliable developer. Clean React frontend with optimized backend architecture and secure MongoDB integration. We will definitely hire again.',
    createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 45 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString()
  },
  {
    _id: 'def4',
    name: 'Sophia Davis',
    company: 'NexaSoft - Australia',
    rating: 5,
    message: 'Built a phenomenal E-commerce platform for us. The UI is gorgeous, the cart logic is flawless, and the entire app feels incredibly snappy.',
    createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 60 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString()
  },
  {
    _id: 'def5',
    name: 'Harry Wilson',
    company: 'USA',
    rating: 5,
    message: 'Transformed our business website into a modern, high-converting masterpiece. The attention to detail in the UX is outstanding.',
    createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 72 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString()
  },
  {
    _id: 'def6',
    name: 'Emily White',
    company: 'Germany',
    rating: 5,
    message: 'Implemented a custom admin panel that saved our team hours of manual work every day. The code quality is top-notch and scalable.',
    createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 85 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString()
  },
  {
    _id: 'def7',
    name: 'George Brown',
    company: 'Tech Startup - UK',
    rating: 5,
    message: 'The API integrations were seamless. Everything from payment gateways to third-party services was handled with absolute professionalism.',
    createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 98 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString()
  },
  {
    _id: 'def8',
    name: 'Charlotte Moore',
    company: 'Canada',
    rating: 5,
    message: 'Excellent problem solver. Fixed several critical bugs in our existing MERN application and significantly improved the load times.',
    createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 110 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString()
  },
  {
    _id: 'def9',
    name: 'Ethan Taylor',
    company: 'Digital Agency - Australia',
    rating: 5,
    message: 'A true professional. Delivered a complex full-stack web application with complex state management perfectly. The final product is stunning.',
    createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 125 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString()
  },
  {
    _id: 'def10',
    name: 'William Clark',
    company: 'USA',
    rating: 5,
    message: 'Fantastic communication and great technical skills. Took our rough ideas and turned them into a beautifully designed, functional web app.',
    createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 140 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString()
  },
  {
    _id: 'def11',
    name: 'Daniel Harris',
    company: 'E-commerce Solutions - UK',
    rating: 5,
    message: 'I am extremely impressed by the responsive UI/UX. The website looks perfect on every device, from large desktop monitors to mobile phones.',
    createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 155 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString()
  },
  {
    _id: 'def12',
    name: 'Jack Thompson',
    company: 'Germany',
    rating: 5,
    message: 'Delivered exactly what we needed on time and on budget. The backend architecture is incredibly robust and ready for scaling.',
    createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 170 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString()
  }
];
